member_descriptions: dark brown leather couch, right crop
dark glossy rounded side table edge
dark leather side table edge crop
stainless steel oven front with towels
black metal fireplace opening with log
dark red wooden barstool chair with leather seat
light wood tabletop with dark base
white-faced wall clock with scalloped rim
stainless-steel drip coffee maker, partial crop
dark brown wooden cabinet door edge-cropped
member_long_descriptions: Narrow silver metal picture frame (vertical) showing a partial beach print with blue sky, yellow umbrella, sand and visible printed text; glass front appears glossy and reflective, frame edge is cropped at the image border — estimated ~0.7 m from camera.

Dark brown leather three-seat couch with padded, vertically segmented back cushions and visible contrast stitching; left armrest is visible, seat surfaces show creased leather sheen and slight wear, and the couch is edge-cropped on the right — appears approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Dark brown/black leather three-seat couch with glossy, padded segmented cushions and visible stitched seams forming rectangular panels; high tufted back with three vertical back sections, rounded armrests, and faint recliner/footrest outlines; left side slightly edge-cropped in the image; appears in good condition and photographed from about 2.0 meters away.

Close-up view of a partially cropped dark glossy side table corner showing a rounded top edge and vertical side panel; appears to be lacquered or painted wood with reflective highlights and minor scuffing, edge-cropped in the narrow vertical frame and likely photographed at about 0.4 m distance.

Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark glossy black leather padded surface with rounded vertical profile and visible seam stitching; appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m) and looks more like an armrest/upholstery piece than a typical hard-sided side table.

Partial, edge-cropped view of a small black, leather-like or vinyl padded side table surface with a curved vertical edge, visible seam stitching, scuff marks and glossy reflections; appears close to the camera at approximately 0.6 m away.

Cream-white scalloped fabric table-lamp shade with a bell shape and decorative fringe/trim; the shade and a small portion of the lamp base are visible but the object is partially edge-cropped at the right and bottom of the image. Appears to be a small bedside/table lamp in intact condition, roughly 0.8 meters from the camera.

Tall, narrow dark-brown varnished wooden side table with ornate carved moldings and recessed panel details, small tabletop holding dishes, partially occluded by a leather sofa at the left edge of the crop; base plinth visible — estimated ~0.9 m from camera.

Overstuffed dark brown glossy leather recliner armchair with padded, tufted cushions and visible creasing/wear; built-in side recline lever on the left arm is visible; chair is mostly visible but slightly cropped at the top-right edge and near the frame border; appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).

Front-facing stainless-steel built-in oven with a dark glass viewing window and horizontal metal handle draped with two white printed tea towels; lower pull-out drawer and reflective, slightly smudged metal surface visible in a close-up crop, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Close-up of a pair of dark brown stained wooden cabinet doors with recessed rectangular panels and a narrow frame; matte-to-satin finish with minor surface reflections, visible vertical seam between the two doors, and slight edge-cropping at the image border — appears to be photographed at close range (≈0.8 m).

Front face of a stainless-steel microwave with a large dark glass door and visible interior light reflections, a black digital control panel on the right, and reflective metallic trim; the appliance front fills the crop and appears about 0.8 meters from the camera.

Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and vertical orientation; image is dim/underexposed with the top slightly edge-cropped and the toe-kick visible at the bottom, photographed from approximately 0.7 m away.

Narrow, tall dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed central panel and visible wood grain; matte finish with light scuffs and no visible handle; right edge of the door is slightly cropped by the image and lighting is dim — object appears roughly 1.0 m from the camera.

Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and beveled molding; shown in a vertical, edge-cropped view with the right edge cut off revealing a small gap/possible handle and slight surface scuffs and uneven finish; appears partial and close to the camera (approx. 1.5 m).

Close-up, edge-cropped view of a dark brown varnished wooden cabinet door front with a rectangular inset panel and simple raised molding; top trim or drawer face is partially visible above, surface has slight gloss and minor scuffs along the upper edge, approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.

Rectangular black metal fireplace insert with a matte surround and glass-front opening showing a dark, unlit interior containing a single large gray/charcoal log or rock-like object; front face is fully visible (not cropped) and the unit appears to be about 1.8 meters from the camera.

Front view of a rectangular black metal fireplace insert set into a matte dark gray-blue surround, with a dark interior void and a single large charred log-like mass on the hearth; no flames visible and appears close to the camera (approximately 1.2 m).

Partial, edge-cropped view of a narrow dark charcoal-brown side table with a matte finish showing a vertical side panel and subtle scuffing; top surface is not visible and the object appears close to the camera (≈0.6 m).

Rectangular dark window with highly reflective glass showing an interior reflection (lamp, chair, staircase banister and a faint human silhouette); light-colored frame appears worn/chipped and is partially cut off by the crop, and the glass surface looks slightly smudged — approximately 2.5 meters from the camera.

Front-facing stainless-steel side-by-side refrigerator with two vertical dark handles, reflective/smudged surface and minor dents; appears close to camera (approximately 1.5 m away) and shown mostly full-height and centered in the crop.

Vertical rectangular brown wooden picture frame with a thin gold inner trim containing a colorful beach-themed print (blue sky, sea and a bird); glass-covered and intact, shown in a narrow edge-cropped vertical crop (top/bottom or sides partially cut off), likely wall-mounted and approximately 1.5 m from the camera.

Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and low-sheen finish, vertical orientation; appears slightly edge-cropped on the left and photographed at close range (~0.8 m from camera).

Glossy dark red/brown wooden barstool-style chair with a round padded black leather seat, carved ornate backrest and turned legs with a circular footrest; slightly edge-cropped at the top/left and photographed close to the camera (about 1.0 m away).

Glossy dark red-brown carved wooden chair with ornate openwork backrest and vertical slats; seat area is partly visible with deep shadow and the top/sides are edge-cropped (partial) in the image — approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dining table/island with a light varnished wood live-edge rectangular tabletop and a dark brown paneled vertical base; a small potted plant sits on the surface and an electrical outlet is visible on the base side; smooth/varnished finish, chairs are partially visible at the left; appears close to the camera (approx. 1.2 m away).

Close-up partial view of a dark brown painted wooden raised-panel two-door cabinet with a central vertical seam, visible wood grain and slightly worn/scuffed finish; the image is edge-cropped and the cabinet appears about 0.8 m from the camera.

Dark brown wooden tall cabinet with vertical recessed-panel doors and a slim vertical metal handle; the unit appears flush against the wall and is partially cut off at the right edge of the crop (approx. 1.5 m from camera).

Dark stained wooden base kitchen cabinet with recessed paneled doors and a glossy finish, lower front shows a small chip/tear and the left side is edge-cropped by the image; countertop overhang is visible above — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Wall-mounted round clock with a white face, black Roman numerals and black hour/minute hands set in a dark glossy scalloped (wavy) frame; shown at an oblique angle and slightly edge-cropped, estimated ~1.5 m from camera.

Partial, edge-cropped glossy black coffee maker with a rounded front, reflective chrome ring at the top and a small blue-lit rectangular panel on the front; appears to be a compact countertop single-cup unit made of glossy plastic and metal, photographed from close range (≈0.5 m).

Partial dark brown wooden dining chair with a light beige upholstered seat cushion and carved vertical backrest slats; front and lower portions are edge-cropped in the image and the chair appears close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).

Partial edge-cropped brown wooden cabinet front showing vertical recessed panels and a lighter wood or laminate top edge with glossy varnish and visible grain; appears close to camera (approximately 0.8 m away).

Partial view of a dark mahogany/brown wooden cabinet front with a glossy, slightly reflective finish and simple rectangular face panels; lower portion is visible and cut off by the image edge, appearing about 1–2 meters from the camera.

Partial view of a compact stainless-steel and black-plastic drip coffee maker with a visible glass carafe and handle on the warmer plate; front-right of the unit is cut off by the image edge, metallic surfaces show reflections, and no illuminated indicators are visible — estimated distance ≈ 1.0 m from the camera.

Varnished dark-brown wooden cabinet door filling most of the crop, with a recessed rectangular center panel, vertical wood grain and a glossy finish showing subtle reflections; small metallic knob or reflective spot near the lower center is visible; appears intact and was likely photographed from roughly 1.0 m.

White plastic rectangular wall outlet faceplate, vertical orientation, right edge partially cropped; two faint circular socket openings visible and surface shows light smudges or pale green marks, image is low-resolution and slightly blurred — estimated ~0.5 m from camera.

Dark brown wooden cabinet/closet door with vertical wood grain and a recessed rectangular center panel; the upper portion is partially cut off by an overhead lamp and the crop is edge-cropped, slightly low-resolution/blurred, with no visible hardware and appears tall and close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).

Partial, edge-cropped dark wooden cabinet panel with glossy finish and visible vertical grain/panel lines; a lighter wooden baseboard or trim is visible at the bottom of the crop; dim lighting and slight surface reflections suggest the object is close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).

Close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and a narrow vertical groove/handle at the left; surface shows worn, scuffed painted finish and uneven discoloration in dim lighting, and the image crop cuts off parts of the frame indicating the object is partially visible — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Close-up, edge-cropped view of a dark brown varnished wooden cabinet door front with a rectangular inset panel and simple raised molding; top trim or drawer face is partially visible above, surface has slight gloss and minor scuffs along the upper edge, approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.
